title: selaginella repanda
intro: Selaginella repanda, also known as Mexican fern or false fern, is a species of flowering plant in the Selaginellaceae family. It is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Selaginella repanda include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
